display.purpose: Hero headlines, major promises, stat values, and pricing values.

body.purpose: Readable persuasive copy, navigation, labels, forms, and UI text.

motionMeta.reducedMotion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion with nonessential transitions disabled.

componentRules.buttons: Use .wr-cta-join.wf-btn for primary route CTAs with pill radius, yellow fill, orange edge, sheen, and lift.
componentRules.sections: Prefer wf-bg-peach, wf-bg-cyan, wf-bg-salmon, wf-bg-white, and wf-bg-dark for long-form page rhythm.
componentRules.cards: Use 16px or 20px radii, soft borders, restrained shadows, and hover lift only when the card is interactive or emphasized.
componentRules.forms: Use .wf-tenant-form, .wf-tenant-input, .wf-field-error, native disabled state, and .wf-btn--loading for conversion forms.
componentRules.sourceToPage: Build only route body content; do not add navbar, header, or footer unless explicitly requested.

dos: Reuse /design-system-template-page as the component reference before creating new website routes.
Preserve exact source text for source-to-page work.
Use Cloudinary images or intentional placeholders.
Maintain WCAG AA intent, visible focus, keyboard usability, reduced motion support, and responsive behavior.
donts: Do not make pages feel like generic SaaS templates.
Do not use sterile blue or purple gradient pages, vague AI-looking layouts, or empty startup polish.
Do not add navbar, header, or footer to route bodies when the shell already provides them.
Do not use side-stripe borders, gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or hero-metric templates as default moves.
